debug_info.goal:
f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ
F : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
ℓ : ℕ → ℝ
hfint : ∀ (n : ℕ), HasIntegral (f n) a b (ℓ n)
hfF : UnifConv f F
RSdiff : ∀ ε > 0, ∃ N, ∀ n ≥ N, ∀ (M : ℕ), |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε
L : ℝ
hL : SeqLim ℓ L
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
N1 N2 : ℕ
N : ℕ := N1 + N2
Nbnd1 : N1 ≤ N
Nbnd2 : N2 ≤ N
hN1 : |ℓ N - L| < ε / 3
Mmax M : ℕ
hM : M ≥ Mmax
hMmax : |(fun N_1 => RiemannSum (f N) a b N_1) M - ℓ N| < ε / 3
hN2 : |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε / 3
⊢ |RiemannSum F a b M - L| ≤ |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L|

failed_attempts:
calc |RiemannSum F a b M - L|
    = |(RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M) + ((RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N) + (ℓ N - L))| := by ring
  _ ≤ |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| + (|RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L|) := le_trans (abs_add _ _) (add_le_add_left (abs_add _ _) _)
  _ = |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := by rw [abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M), add_assoc]
linarith [b2, hN2, hMmax, hN1]
